prompt:
Reference image role: the blog list prototype defines the visual DNA — dark ink-green palette, moonlit tree-hollow library, round paper moon-window with cool moonlight, mossy ancient wood, warm lanterns, restrained Eastern xianxia. PRESERVE this DNA. Layout (left dark text area + right tree-cave with round window and bookshelves) must mirror the prototype.

Create a wide hero background for the blog list page header of "夕丰木". 16:9 wide format.

Composition:
- Right 55%: A library nook inside a tree hollow — ancient wooden bookshelves built into the curved walls with stacked scrolls, traditional Chinese stitched books, and small celadon objects. A large round paper moon-window high on the back wall glowing cool blue-white moonlight #b8d4e0 over a distant landscape. One warm-glowing lantern hanging near the window. Drifting firefly motes.
- Left 45%: Dark, atmospheric, intentionally quiet region with subtle mossy roots — reserved for "藏书枝阁" page title, breadcrumb, search bar, and category tabs to be overlaid by HTML. NO text, NO UI in this image.

Color HEX: base #0B211D, wood #24180F, moss #33513A, lantern #ddb87a, moonlight #b8d4e0, firefly #9CF0BD, gold trim #C0A35D.

Avoid: people, faces, text, browser chrome, hanging signs with characters, navigation, neon, purple, red, MMORPG, cartoonish, oversaturated.
